data.title: Crypto Analyst Predicts 195% Bitcoin Rally, Says Bull Market Not Over Yet
data.description:
The bull market for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is far from over, according to crypto analyst Michaël van de Poppe. 



What Happened: Despite the recent correction of the cryptocurrency to the $80,000 range, van de Poppe foresees a significant rally for Bitcoin.

data.title: Charlie Munger Shared Advice For The Young, But It Applies To All: 'If You've Got Anything You Really Want to Do, Don't Wait Until You're 93'
Will Musk's Cuts Spark a Government Shutdown? Tensions Rise Ahead of March 14 Deadline
data.description: Republicans are reportedly exploring the idea of including cuts made by DOGE in an upcoming government funding bill, dramatically increasing the potential for a government shutdown.

data.title: Consumer Tech News (Feb 24-Feb 28): Australian Regulators Fined Telegram A$1 Million, Apple May Integrate Google Gemini AI Into Siri & More
data.description: Trump praises Apple for $500 billion investment in U.S. Australia fines Telegram for delayed response to preventing child abuse and extremist content. AMC CEO says Apple and Amazon on board with theatrical releases, but Netflix still hesitant. Apple may integrate Google Gemini into Siri. New MacBook Air models with M4 chips expected in March. Apple working to fix AI dictation bug that replaces racist with Trump.

data.title: Rubio Calls On Zelenskyy To Apologize After Tense Trump Meeting: 'Maybe Zelenskyy Doesn't Want A Peace Deal!'
data.description: Rubio urges Zelenskyy to apologize for a tense White House meeting with Trump, questioning his true commitment to peace in Ukraine's war with Russia.
